Abhijit_Muhurta.source: Package attribution: Muhūrta Chintāmaṇi / Nārada Saṁhitā

Brahma_Muhurta.source: Ashtanga Hridaya Sutrasthana 2:1, Charaka Samhita, Manu Smriti 4.92
Brahma_Muhurta.significance: Most auspicious time for meditation, study, and spiritual practices. Sattvik period filled with purity, calmness, and clarity.

Nishita_Muhurta.source: Package derivation from 15-part night Muhurta model

pradosha.significance: No Trayodashi overlap in Pradosha Kaal for this day.

nishitha.source: Package derivation from 15-part night Muhurta model

brahma_muhurta.source: Ashtanga Hridaya Sutrasthana 2:1, Charaka Samhita, Manu Smriti 4.92
brahma_muhurta.significance: Most auspicious time for meditation, study, and spiritual practices. Sattvik period filled with purity, calmness, and clarity.

abhijit.source: Package attribution: Muhūrta Chintāmaṇi / Nārada Saṁhitā

Pradosha_Kaal.significance: No Trayodashi overlap in Pradosha Kaal for this day.

notes: No natal or person-specific inputs are used.
Evaluation is derived only from current Panchang and transit state for the configured location/time.

dagdha_tithi.source: Package rule mapping attributed to Muhurta Chintamani

dagdha_yoga.source: Package rule mapping attributed to classical Muhurta texts

bhadra.description: Bhadra is not active at the evaluation time.

rikta_tithi.source: Package rule mapping attributed to Muhurta Chintamani / Gargiya Jyotisha

varjyam.source: Varjyam (Tyajyam) window from Panchang day calculation
varjyam.description: Varjyam is not active at the evaluation time.

amrita_kaal.label: Amrita Kaal
amrita_kaal.description: Amrita Kaal is not active at the evaluation time.

abhijit_cancellation.source: Package rule mapping attributed to Muhurta Chintamani / Muhurta Martanda

rejection_report.source: Package evaluation summary from configured/transit-only rule mappings
rejection_report.overall_verdict: अस्वीकृत लेकिन उपाय किए जा सकते हैं

detailed_rejections.source: Package rule mapping attributed to Muhurta Chintamani / Brihat Samhita

rejection_report.recommendation: मुहूर्त में महत्वपूर्ण दोष हैं। उपाय मदद कर सकते हैं लेकिन वैकल्पिक समय बेहतर है।
